name: Soundcore Space One Pro

protocol._doc: host->device: 08 ee 00 00 00 <cmd:2> <len:2 LE total> <payload..> <crc>. device->host: 09 ff 00 00 01 <cmd:2> <len:2 LE> <payload..> <crc>. crc = sum(all preceding bytes) & 0xff. Command bytes equal OpenSCQ30 Command([hi,lo]).

_capabilities_source: OpenSCQ30 a3062.rs + common/packet/outbound command ids, then VERIFIED against a BLE GATT capture of the Soundcore app 2026-06-09 (captures/*.pklg; the soundcore_v1 framing rides inside GATT writes/notifications, identical bytes to RFCOMM). Verified: sound_mode 0681 (B0 00/01/02) + its sub-bytes (B1 ANC level, B3 adaptive, B4 wind/'Air protection', B5 transparency level), dolby 0286, surrounding_sounds 01ae, eq 0387, button 0481. NOTE: ANC level / adaptive / wind / transparency-level are SUB-FIELDS of the single 0681 packet, not standalone commands — they need a read-modify-write composite encoder, so they are inject:false (in-app only) for now.

functions.title: Noise control

set._payload_map: Full 6-byte payload B0..B5 = [mode][ancLevel][transpFlag][adaptive][wind][transpLevel]. B0: 00=ANC, 01=Transparency, 02=Normal/Off. B1: ANC strength 0x10..0x50 (we hardcode 50=max). B3: 01=adaptive ANC, 00=manual. So Adaptive = B0=00 + B3=01 → `005000010005` (capture 2026-06-09 showed adaptive = `00 50 00 01 00 05`); plain ANC = B0=00,B3=00 → `005000000005`. B4 wind, B5 transparency level.

read._comment: Multi-byte match (relative to response start): B0 at 78, adaptive flag B3 at 81. Order matters — adaptive checked before plain anc.

functions._verified_note: B0 mode VERIFIED live via Soundcore app + btsnoop 2026-06-14: ANC=00, Transparency=01, Normal/Off=02. Adaptive = B0=00+B3=01 (`005000010005`; capture showed `00 50 00 01 00 05`). 4-mode (NC/Off/Adaptive/Transparency) mirrors Pixel Buds. Read uses multi-byte match (B0 @78 + B3 @81) to tell Adaptive from plain ANC.

functions.title: ANC mode

set._byte: B3 of the sound_mode packet: 01=adaptive, 00=manual. Verified 2026-06-09 (23:48:43 adaptive `005000010005`, 23:48:57 manual `005000000005`).

functions.inject_reason: Sub-field (B3) of the sound_mode packet — needs a read-modify-write composite encoder, not a standalone command. In-app only.

functions.title: Noise cancelling strength
functions.inject_reason: Slider, and a sub-field (B1) of the sound_mode packet — in-app composite control only.

functions.title: Transparency level

set._byte: B5 (last byte) of the sound_mode packet = transparency level 01..05 (B2 also flips to 01 in this mode). Verified 2026-06-09 (23:50:36 `015001000001` … 23:51:17 `015001000005`).

functions.inject_reason: Slider, and a sub-field (B5) of the sound_mode packet — in-app composite control only.

functions.title: Wind noise reduction (Air protection)

set._byte: B4 of the sound_mode packet: 01=on, 00=off. The Soundcore app calls this 'Air protection'. Verified 2026-06-09 (23:48:20 on `005000000105`, 23:48:30 off `005000000005`).

functions.inject_reason: Sub-field (B4) of the sound_mode packet, not a standalone command — needs a read-modify-write composite encoder. Sending 0681 with only this byte would reset the mode/level. In-app composite control only.

set._note: cycle is one packet of 3 bits; needs combined encode

functions.title: Dual connection
functions._verified_note: 0b84 on=01/off=00 confirmed live 2026-06-14 via the Soundcore app 'Двойные соединения' toggle (btsnoop). Device-list read is 0b01; per-device connect/disconnect 0b81/0b82.

set._set_unverified: OpenSCQ30 only captures 017f as the request/update id; the set opcode may differ.

functions.title: Dolby Audio
functions._verified_note: 0286 on=01/off=00 confirmed in BLE capture 2026-06-09 (23:52:51 ON `08ee00000002860b00018a`, 23:53:00 OFF). Standalone toggle.

functions.title: Side tone
functions.summary: Hear your own voice on calls
functions._verified_note: 0184 on=01/off=00 confirmed live 2026-06-14 via the Soundcore app 'Самопрослушивание' toggle (btsnoop capture). Standalone toggle.

functions.title: Surrounding sounds
functions._verified_note: 01ae on=01/off=00 confirmed in BLE capture 2026-06-09 (23:54:11 ON `08ee00000001ae0b0001b1`, 23:54:16 OFF). The Soundcore app labels this 'Surrounding sounds' (OpenSCQ30 calls cmd 01ae ambient_sound_mode_voice_prompt). Standalone toggle.

functions.title: Low-battery prompt
functions.summary: Voice alert when battery is low
functions._verified_note: 1082 off=00 confirmed live 2026-06-14 via the Soundcore app 'Уведомление о низком заряде батареи' toggle (btsnoop). on=01 by pattern. Standalone toggle.

set._note: A3062 uses cmd 0387 (EQ + custom HearID), confirmed in BLE capture 2026-06-09 23:52:32 (long payload: preset id LE u16 + 8 band gains + hearid block). Full layout = OpenSCQ30 set_equalizer_and_custom_hear_id.

Confirmed cmd 0481 with payload `0000<action>` in BLE capture 2026-06-09 23:52:01 (`000007`) / 23:52:23 (`00000f`=none/0xF). Per-gesture: 0481 double, 0482 triple, 0483 hold, 0484 etc. (action code list still TBD).

_observed_unidentified_commands: Host->device opcodes seen in the 2026-06-14 btsnoop while navigating the Soundcore app but NOT yet mapped to a labelled control: 2086, 108d, 1097 (pl=01), 0501, 2003. Recorded for completeness; purpose TBD. Reads observed device->host: 0103 (battery, e.g. 09ff00000101030b000820), 0b02 (dual-connection device list).
_notes: MAC f4:9d:8a:63:e5:f7 used during RE. State packet (cmd 01 01) is 105 bytes; fw '04.36'; model+MAC '3062F7E5638A9DF4'; sound-mode block at idx74 '04 04 0f 03 <mode> 50 00 00 00 05' (mode byte idx78). Capability list mirrors OpenSCQ30 A3062 — all 14 A3062 modules represented as the 21 functions above. Mode B0 mapping CORRECTED 2026-06-14 (anc=00, transparency=01, off=02; was swapped). Verified-live commands: 0681(modes+sub-bytes), 0286(dolby), 01ae(surrounding), 0184(side tone), 1082(low-battery), 0b84(multipoint), 0481(button), 0387(eq). Still guessed (_verified:false): ldac 017f, limit_high_volume 2082, auto_power_off 0186, anc_cycle 0682 — not surfaced as easy toggles in this app build.
